summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Backend: all 11 new pytest cases passed (bulk-categorize empty/invalid/with-rule/multi-no-rule, CSV export headers/year-filter/Uncategorized label, recurring detection on monthly cadence with forecast totals, recurring lookback filter, recurring empty project, yearly analytics now splits Uncategorized into separate income & expense rows). Frontend: created project, uploaded sample CSV, verified Transactions page bulk UI (select-all-checkbox, select-tx-{id}, bulk-actions-bar, bulk-categorize-btn dropdown with 9 bulk-cat-{id} options, bulk-apply-rule checkbox, bulk-delete-btn rendered before action), Export CSV button present (export-csv-btn). Recurring page (/recurring) reachable via nav-recurring sidebar link, lookback select works (data-testid recurring-lookback-select). Yearly Report renders an 'Uncategorized' row in the Expense heatmap (gray dot, £97.20 year total) — confirms iteration 1 design feedback is resolved.

issues: Heatmap cells for the 'Uncategorized' row appear to have very low/no color contrast on the rendered cells (light tan blocks barely visible against background). Consider increasing color intensity for uncategorized buckets or matching the existing scale used for categorized rows.

action_items: (Optional design polish) Increase heatmap cell color contrast for the Uncategorized row in the Yearly Report Expense tab; current gray (#999999) with low opacity makes the monthly cells nearly invisible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~860 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Split into modules (routers/{projects,categories,transactions,analytics,bulk_export}.py + helpers/parsers.py) before further iterations.
analytics_recurring uses datetime arithmetic with timedelta imported inside the loop (line ~798). Move 'from datetime import timedelta' to module-level imports for cleanliness.

Recurring 'next_expected' uses last_seen + avg_gap_days; for monthly cadence (avg_gap 28-32) this is fine, but cadence='quarterly' uses occurrences_per_month=30/avg_gap which yields fractional <1 — formula is sensible but document expected unit (per-month equivalent).

bulk_categorize back-apply loops in Python over up to 50k tx; for large datasets prefer single update_many with $or of normalized keys precomputed, or store normalized merchant key on each tx at insert time for indexed lookup.
CSV export uses StreamingResponse but builds full content in StringIO buffer first (no real streaming). For very large projects consider an async generator yielding lines.
Frontend Transactions.jsx exportCSV opens window with raw API URL — works but bypasses axios baseURL config; OK since API already absolute via lib/api. Confirmed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter2, TEST_ExportUncat, TEST_EmptyRec, TEST_YearlySplit, TEST_UI_<ts> projects during tests; all cleaned up via DELETE /projects/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py. Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/results.xml. New testids: select-tx-{id}, select-all-checkbox, bulk-actions-bar, bulk-categorize-btn, bulk-cat-{cat_id}, bulk-apply-rule, bulk-delete-btn, bulk-clear-btn, export-csv-btn, nav-recurring, recurring-lookback-select, recurring-expense-list, recurring-income-list, recurring-row-{merchant_key}, empty-recurring-{income|expense}. Note: Recurring forecast card labels are CSS-uppercased — assert against innerText with .upper() or use selectors. Electron config in /app/desktop was NOT exercised (out of scope for web tests).
